content.problemStatement: Write a program to output the squares (using multiplication) of numbers from 1 to 5 on separate lines.
content.outputFormat: Print the squares of numbers from 1 to 5, each on a separate line in the format "i - i*i".

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program iterates i from 1 to 5 and prints each i together with its square.
No input is required; the deterministic output is always the same five lines.
Repeated to illustrate that the program always produces the same result.

solution.approach: The program does not need to read any data. It simply iterates i from 1 to 5 and prints i followed by a hyphen, a space, and i*i. To satisfy the generic template that expects handling of multiple test cases, we introduce a dummy variable T = 1 and loop over it, printing the same five lines for each test case (here only one). The algorithm is O(5) time and O(1) extra space.
